content:
Here's a fun project to make us feel like we'll all have gotten a lot done really fast!
I've identified ~~5,985~~ 7,281 rows of the Gameplay sheet that effectively boil down to ~~45~~ 59 unique values, most of which, themselves, are basically just the same words over and over again. 

That's right; it's D-Effect Zones & Phantasmal Dive! I'm gonna upload a small .csv that each team can do a little work on and then we can upload it all as one big chunk! BUT, I'm gonna let our <@&1419930759182942309>s do a little bit first.

Update: CN > EN Translation done! Let's get this bread
